Dialog.name: MSG_709_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 6}C'mon, everyone. Let's band together and win this... I know we can do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 0}The moment man devoured the fruit of knowledge, he sealed his fate...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 0}Entrusting his future to the cards, he clings to a dim hope.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 0}Yes, the Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_130
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 0}Attaining one's dream requires a stern will and unfailing determination.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_140
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}Nyx's Arcana just changed to the Magician![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_150
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 6}His properties changed along with the Arcana! Be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}It doesn't matter how many times he changes Arcana... I'll scan him no matter what![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}I don't care what you are. I'm not backing down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_200
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_210
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 0 0}The silent voice within one's heart whispers the most profound wisdom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_230
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 0 6}I'm picking up a massive energy spike from those wings![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_240
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 12 0 6}Keep your guard up for his attacks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_004
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}You better be ready! {f 4 2} and I are gonna take you down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 13 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_310
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 14 0 0}Celebrate life's grandeur... Its brilliance... Its magnificence...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_320
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 15 0 6}Nyx's feathers are floating... What is this!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_330
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 16 0 6}There's some kind of special power in those feathers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_340
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 17 0 6}Be careful! You're going to be way more vulnerable to mental ailments![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}We've overcome every challenge we've faced![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_400
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 18 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_410
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 19 0 0}Only courage in the face of doubt can lead one to the answer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_420
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 20 0 6}I'm detecting a surge of power from Nyx's sword![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_430
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 21 0 6}Be careful! It's even stronger than it was before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_006
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}I want to protect this world, and everyone in it... I know I can do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_500
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 22 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_510
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 23 0 0}It is indeed a precious gift to understand the forces that guide oneself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_007
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx just changed to the Hierophant![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_008
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}We won't be defeated![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_009
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}We will survive this... by beating you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_520
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 24 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_530
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 25 0 0}There is both joy and wonder in coming to understand the hearts of others...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_010
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx just changed to the Lovers type![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_011
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}We're not giving up... no matter how long it takes![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_540
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 26 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_550
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 27 0 0}One of the greatest blessings attained from the gift of life is the freedom to pursue one's personal goals...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx switched to the Chariot now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_013
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}Everyone is with me... This time, I will defeat you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_560
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 28 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_570
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 29 0 0}To find the one true path, one must seek guidance amidst uncertainty...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_014
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx changed to the Justice Arcana![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_015
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}I'm gonna send you all the way back to the moon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_580
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 30 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_590
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 31 0 0}It requires great courage to look within oneself, and forge one's own path...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_016
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}He changed himself to the Hermit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_018
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}He says, "I will protect everyone!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_600
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 32 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_610
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 33 0 0}Ever-present alongside time is fortune, cruel and unflinching...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Now it's the Fortune Arcana![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_020
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}Screw this fortune... I'm gonna tear it all down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_620
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 34 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_630
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 35 0 0}One needs strength to endure, and rise above suffering and torment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx switched to the Strength Arcana![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_022
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}I have to be strong, for them...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_640
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 36 0 0}The Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_650
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 37 0 0}In the face of unavoidable disaster lies the opportunity to search for redemption.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_023
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx changed to the Hanged Man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_024
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}Father, please watch over me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_700
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 38 0 0}The moment man devoured the fruit of knowledge, he sealed his fate...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_710
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 39 0 0}Entrusting his future to the cards, man clings to a dim hope.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_720
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 40 0 0}Yet, the Arcana is the means by which all is revealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_730
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 41 0 0}Beyond the journey you have taken lies the absolute end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_740
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 42 0 0}It matters not who you are... One thing is always certain: death awaits all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_750
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 43 0 6}I sense... the Death Arcana... This is Nyx's true form...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_760
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 44 0 0}I didn't want you to suffer. But, the time for that is long past...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_820
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 45 0 0}Is this really what you desire...? Well, I already know the answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_830
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 46 0 0}Very well, let us continue... until the world meets its end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_025
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Stay strong, everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_800
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 48 0 0}You cannot avoid death. To live is to die. They are one and the same...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_709_810
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 2 49 0 0}Behold. This is the path you have chosen.[n]{f 1 1}
